About.metaDescription: Amit Banuz — professional event photographer. Based in Israel. Weddings, birthdays, corporate events, magnets.
About.storyP1: I'm Amit — a professional event photographer. I shoot weddings, birthdays, corporate events, and private celebrations across Israel. Specializing in magnets photography and event coverage.
About.storyP2: I blend into the crowd, capturing natural reactions and moments that won't happen again. No forced poses — just life as it happens, through my lens.
About.approachP1: At events I blend into the crowd, catching the real moments — the laughs, the surprises, the energy. My editing is clean and cinematic — I let the image do the talking.
About.approachP2: Every event is different. I want to understand what matters to you, the vibe, what makes your moment yours. That's what ends up in the final shots.

Contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with Amit Banuz. Available for photography, content creation, and creative projects.
Contact.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you soon.
